text:
remko       2009-06-18 09:06:50 UTC

  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:
    share/sgml           commercial.isp.xml 
  Log:
  Remove Highspeedrails (hsr).
  
  Verified via: http://highspeedrails.com/Weblog which has:
  
  HSR will close August 1. Please make alternate arrangements or at least backup your data before then.
  
  Thank you so much for your support and patronage, and please accept my apologies for this inconvenience.
  
  Best of luck to you and yours in the future.
  
  PR:             135686
  Submitted by:   Jeremy McMillan <aphor at me.com>
